channel.title: Scale42 — News
channel.description: Updates from Scale42 — Nordic AI & HPC data centre infrastructure.

item.title: Scale42 and GIG plan 50 MW data centre in Iceland
item.description: Coverage in Data Centre Dynamics on the Bakki joint venture and its initial capacity.

item.title: GIG forms strategic partnership with Scale-42 through GIGA Holdings
item.description: Joint venture creating an integrated energy and digital infrastructure platform across the Nordics.

item.title: Public statement on strategic partnership
item.description: GIG Ltd and Scale42 announce advanced discussions for a joint venture focused on integrated infrastructure.

item.title: Norwegian company plans data centre in Varkaus — Mayor: "Confidence is high"
item.description: Yle reports on Scale42's Finnish project; construction targeted for early 2026.

item.title: DeepSeek and the dispersion of AI compute demand
item.description: What algorithmic efficiency means for mid-scale data centre infrastructure.
